overallImageContent.description: Dominant content type of the image. 'photo' = photograph of a person/object/scenery; 'drawing' = a hand drawing, sketch, schematic or poster; 'text' = a document/sheet whose main content is written text. If mixed, pick the most prominent.

description.description: Complete, detailed description of the image content (up to 4 paragraphs). Describe people, animals, objects, setting, mood, colours and any notable details that could inform a story.

text.description: Full OCR transcription of every piece of text visible in the image, preserving the original language. Reasonably estimate unreadable or partially obscured text. Empty string if there is no text.

characters.description: Every distinct person or animal visible in the image. Empty array if none.

label.description: Short stable identifier for this character within the image, e.g. 'person_1', 'dog_1'.

age.description: Estimated age or age range, e.g. 'child (~6)', 'young adult (20s)', 'elderly'.

physicalDescription.description: Vivid physical description: build, hair colour/style, eye colour, skin tone, distinctive permanent features (e.g. glasses). For animals: breed, fur/colour, size. Do not describe transient pose.

box_2d.description: Bounding box around the character as exactly four integers [ymin, xmin, ymax, xmax], each normalised to a 0-1000 grid relative to the image.
